title: Easy Chunk Loader
body:
This mod just adds a simple chunk loader block.

This block have pretty cheap craft but for chunk loading it burns ender pearls. (8 per real hour)

- **Recipe (Smithing)**

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/n5eKI9nj/images/f6882372ea4bca15d463e392438cc7dbf12b690f.png)

**(version 1.0.1 and higher)**:

If you have **Cloth Config API**, you can change mod settings:

- Set the chunk loader to work without fuel.
- Set pearls consuming per real hour.
